title: Kredit
html:
Kredit (German: Credit, Loan) is a support organization created by Wille. It supplies villages founded after the Near Third Impact and supports them in trading among themselves. It first appears in Evangelion: 3.0 + 1.0 Thrice Upon a Time.

Organizations
Seele | Gehirn | United Nations | IPEA | JSSDF | Wille | Kredit
Special Agency Nerv:
Nerv Headquarters | Nerv 1st Branch | Nerv 2nd Branch | Nerv 3rd Branch
Nerv 7th Branch (Tabgha Base) | Bethany Base | Golgotha Base




This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
